description_long: This is a sleek, modern coupe car with a low, aerodynamic profile and a distinctive two-door design. The body is primarily finished in a glossy white color, accented by black elements on the roof, hood, and rear, with subtle blue highlights on the front grille and rear bumper. The car features large, multi-spoke alloy wheels and low-profile tires, emphasizing its sporty character. The front end is characterized by sharp, angular headlights and a sculpted hood, while the rear showcases a wide stance with integrated taillights and a subtle spoiler. The side profile reveals smooth, flowing lines and frameless windows, contributing to its dynamic appearance. The interior, though not fully visible, is likely composed of leather, plastic, and metal, typical of high-end coupe cars.
description: A modern, sporty white coupe car with black and blue accents, two doors, and a streamlined, aerodynamic design. Features include large alloy wheels, sharp headlights, and a fastback roofline.
description_view_0: Front view showing the aggressive grille, blue-accented headlights, and sculpted hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the two-door coupe profile, large wheels, and smooth body lines.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wide stance, integrated taillights, and subtle rear spoiler.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the coupe silhouette and frameless windows.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
